name: Grand Brilliance Group Holdings Limited
summary: Grand Brilliance Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in supplying of medical devices in Hong Kong. The company offers medical consumables; medical instruments; and medical equipment, as well as develops healthcare products. In addition, it provides medical device solutions, such as market trend analysis, sourcing of medical devices, after-sale services, technical support and training services, medical devices leasing services, and quality assurance services; and holds trademarks, as well as provides maintenance services. Grand Brilliance Group Holdings Limited sells its products to various private hospitals, public hospitals, private clinics, non-profit organizations, universities, and individual end-users. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. Grand Brilliance Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of B&A Success Limited.
